title: zeuxine longifolia
intro: Zeuxine longifolia, also known as the snake grass or Chinese dodder, is a type of parasitic flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Zeuxine longifolia include reducing fever, alleviating cough and sore throat, and treating various infections such as the flu and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Zeuxine longifolia is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
